prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名近年约第99–113名，2026年最新排名第113名，属中游211层次；该校未出现在近年声誉舆情及 投档异常文件中，声誉平稳；抖音热度排名第50位，评价为"较热"，短视频平台有一定关注度，但无明显爆款传播；该校以航 海、交通运输为特色，相关学科在行业内具有较高认可度。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类热度2024年较2023年明显降温（-14.89），电子信息/通信类高热推荐（+6.78），电 气工程及其自动化高热推荐（+7.81），自动化类相关专业热度较高；福建省物理类考生数从2021年11.7万持续增至2025年19.2万，2026年估算约20.5万，考生规模持续扩大，竞 争加剧；大连海事大学位于辽宁大连，属东北地区，对福建考生而言属于跨省就读；福建考生对沿海/南方高校偏好较强，东北 高校存在一定地域冷感，但该校作为211层次仍具吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次14083名、2026年大幅扩招（+15.8%）导致竞争加剧、福建省物理类考生持续增长 、电子信息/电气等热门专业热度上升等因素，预计2026年最低位次将较2025年后移（位次数字增大）。预测最低位次约15500名，区间15000–16000名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the Physics Category were approximately 13474 → 15611 → 13380 → 14435 → 14083, showing a fluctuating and slightly declining trend over the past 5 years with an amplitude of about 2200 places; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 14083; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 65 in 2021, 63 in 2022, 63 in 2023, 57 in 2024, and 57 in 2025; the 2026 plan increases to 66, an expansion of about 15.8% compared to 2025, which is a significant expansion and will notably intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science main ranking has been around 99–113 in recent years, with the latest 2026 ranking at 113, placing it in the mid-tier 211 level; the university has not appeared in recent reputation incidents or abnormal admission files, indicating a stable reputation; its Douyin popularity ranks 50th, rated as 'relatively hot', with some attention on short video platforms but no obvious viral spread; the university is characterized by navigation and transportation disciplines, which have high recognition within the industry.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of Computer Science majors significantly cooled in 2024 compared to 2023 (-14.89), while Electronics/Communication majors are highly recommended (+6.78), Electrical Engineering and Automation is highly recommended (+7.81), and Automation-related majors have high popularity; the number of Physics Category examinees in Fujian Province has continuously increased from 117,000 in 2021 to 192,000 in 2025, with an estimated 205,000 in 2026, indicating a growing pool of candidates and intensifying competition; Dalian Maritime University is located in Dalian, Liaoning, in the Northeast region, which is an inter-provincial study destination for Fujian examinees; Fujian examinees have a strong preference for coastal/southern universities, and there is some regional coolness towards Northeast universities, but the university's 211 status still makes it attractive.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 14083, the significant expansion in 2026 (+15.8%) leading to intensified competition, the continuous growth of Fujian Physics Category examinees, and the rising popularity of hot majors like Electronics/Electrical, the minimum ranking for 2026 is expected to shift backward (ranking number increases) compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 15500, with a range of 15000–16000.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (<15000), you can prioritize reaching for popular majors like Computer Science and Artificial Intelligence.
